2603.18532.title: Scaling Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning for Robot VLAs with Generative 3D Worlds
2603.18532.paper_summary: The strong performance of large vision-language models (VLMs) trained with reinforcement learning (RL) has motivated similar approaches for fine-tuning vision-language-action (VLA) models in robotics. Many recent works fine-tune VLAs directly in the real world to avoid addressing the sim-to-real gap. While real-world RL circumvents sim-to-real issues, it inherently limits the generality of the resulting VLA, as scaling scene and object diversity in the physical world is prohibitively difficult. This leads to the paradoxical outcome of transforming a broadly pretrained model into an overfitted, scene-specific policy. Training in simulation can instead provide access to diverse scenes, but designing those scenes is also costly. In this work, we show that VLAs can be RL fine-tuned without sacrificing generality and with reduced labor by leveraging 3D world generative models. Using these models together with a language-driven scene designer, we generate hundreds of diverse interactive scenes containing unique objects and backgrounds, enabling scalable and highly parallel policy learning. Starting from a pretrained imitation baseline, our approach increases simulation success from 9.7% to 79.8% while achieving a 1.25$\times$ speedup in task completion time. We further demonstrate successful sim-to-real transfer enabled by the quality of the generated digital twins together with domain randomization, improving real-world success from 21.7% to 75% and achieving a 1.13$\times$ speedup. Finally, we further highlight the benefits of leveraging the effectively unlimited data from 3D world generative models through an ablation study showing that increasing scene diversity directly improves zero-shot generalization.
2603.18532.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在強化學習（RL）訓練下的強勁表現，激勵了類似的方法來微調機器人中的視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型。許多近期的研究直接在真實世界中微調VLA，以避免處理模擬到真實的差距。雖然真實世界的強化學習繞過了模擬到真實的問題，但它本質上限制了所得到的VLA的通用性，因為在物理世界中擴展場景和物體的多樣性是極其困難的。這導致了一個矛盾的結果，即將一個廣泛預訓練的模型轉變為過擬合的、特定場景的策略。在模擬中訓練則可以提供多樣的場景，但設計這些場景的成本也很高。在這項工作中，我們展示了VLA可以在不犧牲通用性且減少勞動的情況下進行強化學習微調，這是通過利用3D世界生成模型來實現的。使用這些模型與語言驅動的場景設計器，我們生成了數百個包含獨特物體和背景的多樣互動場景，使得可擴展且高度並行的策略學習成為可能。從預訓練的模仿基準開始，我們的方法將模擬成功率從9.7%提高到79.8%，同時在任務完成時間上實現了1.25$\times$的加速。我們進一步展示了成功的模擬到真實轉移，這得益於生成的數位雙胞胎的質量以及領域隨機化，將真實世界的成功率從21.7%提高到75%，並實現了1.13$\times$的加速。最後，我們通過消融研究進一步強調了利用3D世界生成模型所提供的有效無限數據的好處，顯示增加場景多樣性直接改善了零樣本泛化。
2603.18532.author: Andrew Choi et.al.
2603.18532.authors: Andrew Choi, Xinjie Wang, Zhizhong Su, Wei Xu
